headline: Cencora Announces Date and Time for Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., April 01, 2026--Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) today announced that it plans to release its results for the Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, prior to the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The Company will host a conference call to discuss the results at 8:30 a.m. ET on May 6, 2026.

headline: Can CAH's Specialty Flywheel Strategy Unlock Long-Term Growth?
summary: CAH's specialty flywheel strategy links distribution, MSOs and biopharma services, boosting partnerships, drug launches and recurring revenue potential.
